title: Taxi Ride Discussion
opening: Good morning! Where are we headed today? Just so I can map out the quickest route, traffic permitting, of course.

t1.prompt: Good morning! Where are we headed today? Just so I can map out the quickest route, traffic permitting, of course.
t1.promptTranslation: Good morning! Where are we headed today? Just so I can map out the quickest route, traffic permitting, of course. — Good morning! Where are you going today? I'll plan the fastest way, traffic allowing.

t2.prompt: Right, the airport. Not a problem. Are you in a rush, or would you prefer to take the scenic route today? We could skirt around the city centre to avoid the usual congestion, or brave it for a more direct path.
t2.promptTranslation: Right, the airport. Not a problem. Are you in a rush, or would you prefer to take the scenic route today? We could skirt around the city centre to avoid the usual congestion, or brave it for a more direct path. — Okay, the airport. No problem. Are you in a hurry, or do you want the scenic route? We can go around the city to avoid traffic, or go through it for a faster way.

t3.prompt: Well, for that distance, typically you're looking at around £35-£40, give or take, depending on traffic and the precise route we take. With peak hour surcharges, it could nudge a little higher. We can certainly go via the bypass if you're keen.
t3.promptTranslation: Well, for that distance, typically you're looking at around £35-£40, give or take, depending on traffic and the precise route we take. With peak hour surcharges, it could nudge a little higher. We can certainly go via the bypass if you're keen. — For that distance, it's usually about £35-£40, but it might change due to traffic or route. Extra charges during peak times could make it slightly more. We can take the bypass if you want.

t4.prompt: Excellent. So, the airport via the quickest route. Just buckle up, and we'll be off in a jiffy. Any luggage to pop in the boot, or are we good to roll?
t4.promptTranslation: Excellent. So, the airport via the quickest route. Just buckle up, and we'll be off in a jiffy. Any luggage to pop in the boot, or are we good to roll? — Great. So, the airport by the fastest route. Just fasten your seatbelt, and we'll leave quickly. Do you have any luggage for the trunk, or are we ready to go?

t5.prompt: Alright, here we go. Looks like we're hitting a bit of a bottleneck on the bypass, so it might add a few minutes to our estimated arrival, but we should still make good time. Hopefully, it clears up shortly.
t5.promptTranslation: Alright, here we go. Looks like we're hitting a bit of a bottleneck on the bypass, so it might add a few minutes to our estimated arrival, but we should still make good time. Hopefully, it clears up shortly. — Okay, we're off. There's some traffic on the bypass, so we might be a little late, but we should still arrive reasonably soon. Hopefully, it will clear up soon.

t6.prompt: No worries at all. I accept all major credit cards, cash, or if you prefer, I've got a QR code for mobile payments. Whatever's easiest for you when we pull up.
t6.promptTranslation: No worries at all. I accept all major credit cards, cash, or if you prefer, I've got a QR code for mobile payments. Whatever's easiest for you when we pull up. — No problem. I take credit cards, cash, or mobile payments (QR code). Whatever is easiest for you when we arrive.

t7.prompt: And here we are, right on cue despite that slight snag. That'll be £38, please. Thanks for riding with me, have a splendid day!
t7.promptTranslation: And here we are, right on cue despite that slight snag. That'll be £38, please. Thanks for riding with me, have a splendid day! — We've arrived, exactly on time despite that small problem. The fare is £38, please. Thank you for the ride, have a great day!

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you possibly rephrase or speak a little clearer?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you possibly rephrase or speak a little clearer? — Sorry, I didn't understand. Could you say that again, or more clearly?
